docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $200.00 FILED BY ALVES, SABRINA AS TO DEFENDANT FRITSCH, JOSHUA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-14-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALVES, SABRINA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALVES, SABRINA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FRITSCH, JOSHUA PLAINTIFF BEARS THE BURDEN OF PROOF AND DID NOT CARRY HER BURDEN WHERE DEFENDANT AND HIS WITNESS TESTIFIED THAT (1) DEFENDANT ONLY AGREED TO BUY THE WARDROBE IF HE COULD GET IT OUTSIDE; AND (2) THE WARDROBE WAS BROKEN WHEN PLAINTIFF'S BOYFRIEND MOVED IT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED JUL-24-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FRITSCH, JOSHUA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-14-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-14-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506 PLAINTIFF SABRINA ALVES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSHUA FRITSCH IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-14-2018 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-03-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
